ddls:
CREATE TABLE "healthcare_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number (SSN) of the patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "blood_group" TEXT /* Blood group of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (M/F) */,
  "smoker" INTEGER /* Smoking status of the patient (True/False) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the patient is registered */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact name */,
  "emergency_phone" TEXT /* Emergency contact phone number */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider name */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Insurance policy number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the record */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis made by the healthcare provider */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the patient */,
  "prescription" TEXT /* Prescription details for the patient */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the record was created */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms reported by the patient */,
  "tests_ordered" TEXT /* Tests ordered by the healthcare provider */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of the tests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for the appointment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor assigned to the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the appointment is scheduled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the doctor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the doctor */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the doctor is affiliated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for the treatment plan */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who created the treatment plan */,
  "treatment_details" TEXT /* Detailed treatment plan for the patient */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment plan (e.g., active, completed, suspended) */,
  "progress_notes" TEXT /* Progress notes for the treatment plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prescriptions" (
  "prescription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prescription */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for the prescription */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who prescribed the medication */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the prescription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the prescription */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the prescription (e.g., active, completed, suspended) */,
  "refills" INTEGER /* Number of refills allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prescription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin, patient) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose record was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the insurance provider */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the insurance provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the insurance provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance plan */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance provider offering the plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance plan */,
  "plan_details" TEXT /* Details of the insurance plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_plans_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES insurance_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_portal" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with a portal account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the patient */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the patient's portal account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the patient's portal account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being billed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the bill was generated */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bill (e.g., paid, pending, overdue) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill being paid */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES billing ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities_services" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility offering the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id", "service_name")
)
